title: clematis obvallata var. obvallata
intro: Clematis obvallata var. obvallata, also known as the Evergreen Clematis, is a flowering evergreen climber native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clematis obvallata var. obvallata include relief from pain, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as being used as a treatment for skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
